transcript.text:
[The special set is not enough]
You're eating all of that?
[Steamed Seafood]
[The tensions are out of this world]
[Cheese+clam combo]
[Kalguksu Noodles]
[I must get this on film!]
[You sure do know how to eat]
Hello everyone
I'm here in the countryside
I'm craving clams right now So I came to the nearest clam restaurant
I really want some clams
[Daejeon] [Soo-Jo Gae Jeon Gol]
I should order the biggest size
It says "order per person for the table"
So do I have to order 1 serving?

Do you guys have something for 8 people?
-For 8 people? -8 servings?
-Big platter, please -That one is 7 servings
That special set is for 7 people
-Do you have something bigger? -That's the biggest one
I'll take that and 2 additional servings
What are you going to do with all of that?
I eat a lot
You're eating it all?
Come over here
[What's going on?]
She wants the special set and...
[Explains her order]
[A huge steamer]
[7 servings of seafood]
[And add 2 more servings]

-Can I open it? -Yes
10 minutes
I can eat in 10 minutes
I can't wait!
-Here's the appetizer -Thank you
That looks yummy
I love it
What a unique way to serve fried eggs
The egg whites are like steamed egg
[Don't forget, you're here to eat clams!]
[10 minutes is up]
Can I eat now?
Don't open it yet It's not quite ready
I'll open it for you now
I can eat it now, right?
Eat the comb pen shell and squids first

Thank you
[Why are you posing?]
[She wants to take a photo of her]
I'm going to eat this as a whole
Check this out
Dip it in soy sauce
It's so chewy
Red scallop
It's cooked so well
Clams just taste so good
I don't know why they're so good
Abalone is huge too
The abalone in here are pretty big
I like eating this with sesame oil with salt
I love sesame oil
It tastes so good together

I love it I'm happy
Let's try the soup
I love it
This is perfect for a hangover
I feel like I can eat this while drinking and not get drunk
Scallop next
Let's dip this in sesame oil too
Scallops are the best
It's just so tender
Let's dig in
Now that I tried 1 of each
These small clams are so tasty
They're so tender
These are seasoned too
No dips are needed
There's a cheese fondue here

Cheese on the scallop
That's too much
I don't want to overwhelm it with cheese
Clams are the best
You guys want some too, right?
Mussel!
Wrap the clam with cheese
Cut it with scissors
That's so good
I love how the juice explodes in your mouth
Right, there's squid
They said they'll bring the octopus soon
[Singing about squids]
Squid needs to be dipped in chojang (red chili vinegar paste)
This possibly can't go wrong
Sesame oil is magical

[Squid with cheese]
No seasoning is needed if you have cheese
Cheese is so good
The times I feel real happiness when doing mukbang are:
1) meat and 2) clams
Comb pen shell too
Let's gather them here
Some scallop too
Some cheese too
What's this?
The visuals are incredible
Amazing
Fishcake!
I didn't know
It was hidden
Why're you here?

Dip it in soy sauce
Delicious
I'll use the tong and scissors now
How're you so skinny?
I'm jealous
I'm almost finished
Where did it go? I want more
Excuse me, Can I get the octopus?
Let's finish this first
I'm not even close to being full yet
I told my nephew that there's a YouTuber here
And he asked for the name
So I said "Tzuyang"
"She's a very famous person!"
And also said, "Are you ready to get really busy after?"
So I said, "No way, I'm not ready"

We're already so busy these days
Our cheese is 98.7% natural cheese
98.7% real cheese
[But where's the octopus?]
Where did it go?
Did it disappear?
It escaped Find it!
Where did you go? I'm sorry
We're sorry
Sorry!
[Don't look]
-Ready to eat now? -Yes
With real cheese
That's so cool
No wonder it tastes so different
Excuse me

Can I order kalguksu noodles?
These get better over time
Looks tasty
Thank you
These octopuses are good after being cooked for at least 20~30 minutes
7~8 minutes is when it's the toughest
So I'll eat the noodles first
The soup is the best right about now too
It's really amazing
It was good at first too, but it's even better now
I feel like you can make porridge here too
Noodles are good too
This refreshing soup will go well with anything
Let's eat some cheese
That's hot
Amazing

I finished it all
That's truly incredible
Where does it all go?
In my tummy
Why don't you get fat?
It's a business secret!
So there's a way?
No, I'm joking!
The octopus is left
But these taste best after being cooked for 20~30 minutes
I'll finish this after I end the mukbang
I ended up coming to this restaurant very randomly
And later found out that it's very hard to get a table here during lunch/dinner times unless you make a reservation
But I picked a good day and I came in at a late hour, so I was lucky
Thanks everyone!
Let me see too

She wants to see too
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
